items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Nvidia’s Future in China Remains Unclear After Trump-Xi Summit
items.summary: The standoff comes as Chinese firms increasingly turn to domestic chipmakers like Huawei, in a drive to reduce China’s dependence on Western technologies.
items.text_it: Il futuro di Nvidia in Cina rimane incerto dopo il vertice Trump-Xi
items.summary_it: La situazione di stallo arriva mentre le aziende cinesi si rivolgono sempre più ai produttori di chip nazionali come Huawei, nel tentativo di ridurre la dipendenza della Cina dalle tecnologie occidentali.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Trump’s big trip was supposed to sell 500 Boeing planes. China is only buying 200 of them.
items.summary: Boeing’s stock on Thursday headed for its steepest fall in six months after President Donald Trump said China is buying 200 of the company’s jets, disappointing investors who had expected more than double that number.
